hook: A good environment does not just expose you to people; it helps you feel a little more like yourself around them.
body: That combination of contact and self-expression is where confidence tends to become more durable.

hook: If a room only spikes anxiety and never supports ease, repetition alone may not teach the lesson you want.
body: Look for environments that challenge you enough to grow while still giving you enough safety to learn.

hook: Look for environments that challenge you enough to grow while still giving you enough safety to learn.
body: A structured group where you know why you are there often builds better social range than a purely chaotic scene.

hook: A structured group where you know why you are there often builds better social range than a purely chaotic scene.
body: Pick settings that create both repetition and enough psychological room to stay present.
